name: Clam Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the juice from the can of clams.
2. Put the clams and juice in a blender; cover.
3. Blend on high speed until smooth.
4. Add cream, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, pepper, and salt.
5. Serve chilled; sprinkle with chopped chives and paprika.
6. Optionally, add a little milk to achieve a thinner consistency; do so during the blending process.
